subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath strengthened us to acknowledge His unity and oneness, and hath guided us unto His path and sustained us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی ایدنا علی الاقرار بوحدانیته و فردانیته و هدانا الی صراطه و رزقنا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for peace and unity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
